Get specific OpenID Connect Identity Provider
Generate MFA caching SSH key for the connected user
Generate MFA caching SSH key for another user

endpoints.summary: Delete MFA caching SSH key for connected user
Delete MFA caching SSH key for another user

endpoints.summary: Get MFA caching SSH key for connected user
Get MFA caching SSH key for another user
endpoints.doc_url: https://docs.cyberark.com/pam-self-hosted/latest/en/content/webservices/get mfa caching ssh key for another user.htm

endpoints.summary: Import stored platform alongside existing platform (patch)
Get all bulk account uploads for user
Create access request for multiple accounts
Add an image to the system
Retrieve the current active custom theme
